memberships_tenant_select.name: memberships_tenant_select
memberships_tenant_select.using: user_id = (select auth.uid()) or organization_id in (select public.user_organization_ids())

invoice_tax_lines_tenant_select.name: invoice_tax_lines_tenant_select
invoice_tax_lines_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.invoices i where i.id = invoice_id and public.has_business_access(i.business_id))

combo_section_items_tenant_select.name: combo_section_items_tenant_select
combo_section_items_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.combo_sections cs join public.products p on p.id = cs.combo_product_id where cs.id = combo_section_id and public.has_business_access(p.business_id))

combo_sections_tenant_select.name: combo_sections_tenant_select
combo_sections_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.products p where p.id = combo_product_id and public.has_business_access(p.business_id))

modifiers_tenant_select.name: modifiers_tenant_select
modifiers_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.modifier_groups g where g.id = modifier_group_id and public.has_business_access(g.business_id))

product_modifier_groups_tenant_select.name: product_modifier_groups_tenant_select
product_modifier_groups_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.products p where p.id = product_id and public.has_business_access(p.business_id))

product_variants_tenant_select.name: product_variants_tenant_select
product_variants_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.products p where p.id = product_id and public.has_business_access(p.business_id))

product_recipes_tenant_select.name: product_recipes_tenant_select
product_recipes_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.products p where p.id = product_id and public.has_business_access(p.business_id))

order_item_modifiers_tenant_select.name: order_item_modifiers_tenant_select
order_item_modifiers_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.order_items oi join public.orders o on o.id = oi.order_id where oi.id = order_item_id and public.has_business_access(o.business_id))

order_items_tenant_select.name: order_items_tenant_select
order_items_tenant_select.using: exists (select 1 from public.orders o where o.id = order_id and public.has_business_access(o.business_id))
